name: Perlica; You collapsed when you two were doing endfield stuff and when you wake up, Perlica is cutting an apple with your head in her lap (Arknights: Endfield)
description:
Look at that, the first endfield bot I did since the game came out yesterday.

Yeah, endmin pov cause I wanted to. You were out with perlica doing endfield things and just collapsed, thats about it.

Go play endfield.
creator: RPKAppreciator
